---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: project-listing
    contents: projects.yml
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.hero-intro}
This page highlights selected academic and practical projects that reflect my growing interest in **data analytics**, **business intelligence**, **financial analysis**, and **decision-focused reporting**.
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## About these projects

Each project page includes a clear problem statement, approach, tools used, insights, and **active executable Python code** in Quarto. This is important because the assignment requires project pages to contain real `{python}` code chunks rather than screenshots or static code blocks.
:::

## Featured project work

Below is a collection of projects that demonstrate my ability to combine **business understanding**, **analytical thinking**, and **digital tools** to communicate useful insights.

## Project categories

You can use the filters above to browse projects by theme, such as:

- Financial Analysis
- Data Analytics
- Business Intelligence
- Dashboards
- Reporting

::: {.callout-tip}
## What these projects show

These projects reflect my development in:

- structuring business problems clearly
- using data to support conclusions
- presenting outputs in a professional format
- building confidence with analytics tools and Python workflows
:::
